overview: A Church Prayer Request Platform where congregation members can submit prayer requests publicly and admins can manage them through a protected dashboard. Features real-time request tracking, status management (Pending/Prayed), search and filtering, and a clean card-based UI with dark mode support.
features: Public prayer request submission form with anonymous option
Admin dashboard with protected login via Internet Identity
Real-time prayer request management — mark as prayed or delete
Search and sort requests by name, message, or date
Toast notifications, confirmation dialogs, and loading states
Fully responsive mobile-first design with dark mode support
